context:
💡INTEL
=======
📌Sinobi is the new addition to the existing TOR infrastructure of Lynx and INC Ransomware Groups
📌Targeted a single US company with Windows Executable
📌Encrypted files are appeneded with extension: .SINOBI
📌Ransom Note is titled as: README.txt
📌Clear Web Site is registered on 22nd June 2025

🔬Sample Analysis
=================
📌Code base having a match with 4 Ransomware Groups: Lynx, PureCrypter, INC and Babuk
📌Data Encode: XOR
📌Data Encryption using: Curve25519, AES
📌Generate random numbers via WinAPI
📌Data Decode using Base64 via WinAPI
📌Create new key via CryptAcquireContext

Site: chat.sinobi.us.org
IP: 194.87.145.118
Location: Russia
ASN: AS48347

MD5
===
08759d9ea2712d693891c870bbebbde3
